chapter_title.en: Chapter 72 – Al-Zahaar (likening the wife as a mother)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/260)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/260)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الْمَمْلُوكِ أَ عَلَيْهِ ظِهَارٌ فَقَالَ عَلَيْهِ نِصْفُ مَا عَلَى الْحُرِّ صَوْمُ شَهْرٍ وَ لَيْسَ عَلَيْهِ كَفَّارَةٌ مِنْ صَدَقَةٍ وَ لَا عِتْقٍ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad, from Ahmad, from Ibn Abu Najran, from Muhammad Bin Humran who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullahasws about the owned slave, is there Zahaar upon him?’ So heasws said: ‘Upon him is half of what is upon the free. He should Fast a month, and there is no expiation upon him from neither a charity nor an emancipation (of a slave)’.
en.sarwar: 13. Muhammad ibn Ahmad has narrated from ibn abu Najran from Muhammad ibn Humran who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a slave if there is al-Zihar on him. He (the Imam) said, ‘He owes one-half of what becomes due on free people. He owes only to fast one month and setting free of slaves does not apply to him as well as charity.’”
